creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text: Update to 1.6.6a.  The reason for the delay is that 1.6.6 was a mess, so I just decided to let the Linux folks find and fix the problems.  I've "enhanced" the pkg-message file so hopefully I'll get fewer support requests.  Note:  The 1.x designation indicates that this is now a "stable" release, but full error handling support for FreeBSD has yet been implemented.
